ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blogs" (
  "blog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blog */,
  "blog_name" TEXT /* Name of the blog */,
  "blog_description" TEXT /* Description of the blog */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the blog was created */,
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blog's administrator */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time the blog was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "blog_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blog the post belongs to */,
  "post_title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time the post was last updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post's author */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Calculated engagement score based on comments, likes, and shares */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_blog_id FOREIGN KEY ("blog_id") REFERENCES blogs ("blog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "comment_body" TEXT /* Body of the comment */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the comment is active or not */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Calculated engagement score based on votes, replies, and flags */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the reply belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the reply */,
  "reply_body" TEXT /* Body of the reply */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was created */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was last updated */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Calculated engagement score based on votes and flags */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_replies_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_on" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  "expires_on" TEXT /* Date and time the role assignment expires (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user casting the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_votes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being flagged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user raising the flag */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the flag */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the flag was raised */,
  "reviewed" INTEGER /* Whether the flag has been reviewed by a moderator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_flags_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_flags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the report */,
  "report_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the report was submitted */,
  "reviewed" INTEGER /* Whether the report has been reviewed by a moderator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_reports_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderator_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being acted on */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator taking the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., delete, hide) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was taken */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time the action was last updated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the action */,
  "reviewed" INTEGER /* Whether the action has been reviewed by another moderator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytic_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being tracked */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being tracked */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., views, engagement) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was recorded */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytic_metrics_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytic_metrics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)
